title: The Boys from Syracuse
writer: George Abbott, Charles Grayson, Titus Maccius Plautus
actors: Allan Jones, Irene Hervey, Martha Raye
plot: The action takes place in Ephesus in ancient Asia Minor, and the story concerns the efforts of two boys from Syracuse, Antipholus and his servant Dromio, to find their long-lost twins who, for reason of plot confusion, are also na...
